summary: PhantomForce installs the local runtime and product helpers it needs into PhantomForce-owned app data folders so the user experiences one app.
internalComponentDisclosure: Bundled components are installed as PhantomForce components. Third-party licenses and notices remain available in the app/legal bundle and install records.

bundledCapabilities.label: Local runtime
bundledCapabilities.purpose: Runs PhantomForce desktop services and app workflows.

bundledCapabilities.label: AI operations services
bundledCapabilities.purpose: Supports chat, routing, local task preparation, memory, and workflow execution.

bundledCapabilities.label: Media helpers
bundledCapabilities.purpose: Supports image/video import, preview, local processing, and exports.

bundledCapabilities.label: PhantomPlay runtime
bundledCapabilities.purpose: Supports approved browser-first games and saved local progress.

bundledCapabilities.label: Update components
bundledCapabilities.purpose: Checks, verifies, and applies PhantomForce app updates.

boundaries: No bundled component is installed under a misleading system-file name.
No component is granted privileged access unless the user or administrator approves the operating-system prompt.
External sends, uploads, posts, and destructive changes remain approval-gated.
Third-party notices are stored in the app/legal bundle and are not shown as separate user-facing apps.
